The IT Operations Platform Your Team Will Actually Use

Asset management, compliance tracking, risk management, UAR, and more — unified in a single open-source platform. No per-seat pricing. No feature gates.

Core Modules

Everything your IT department needs

40+ modules covering the full operational lifecycle — all open source, all included.

Asset & Inventory

Track assets, peripherals, software, and licenses with full lifecycle history. Assign, maintain, and dispose with audit trails.

Assets Peripherals Licenses Software

Compliance & Audit

Map controls to SOC 2, ISO 27001 and more. Generate audit-ready snapshots and track your Statement of Applicability.

SOC 2 ISO 27001 SOA Audits

Risk Management

Maintain a living risk register. Link risks to assets, services, and vendors. Track incidents and security assessments.

Risk Register Incidents Assessments

User Access Review

Automate UAR processes. Compare access lists, surface findings, and create immutable execution records.

UAR Access Review Findings

Vendor & Procurement

Manage suppliers, contracts, subscriptions, and budgets. Track renewals and vendor compliance status.

Suppliers Contracts Budgets Subscriptions

Service Mapping

Build dependency graphs for business services. Map services to assets and track SLAs.

Services Dependencies SLA Tracking
Also includes: Credentials Vault Certificate Tracking Policy & Training HR Onboarding/Offboarding ATS REST API SAML SSO MFA RBAC Audit Log Notifications
Feature Tour

See OpsDeck in action

Explore how each module helps your team stay on top of IT operations.

Assets

Asset & Inventory Management

A unified register for every asset your team manages — from laptops and servers to SaaS licenses and software.

  • Full lifecycle tracking: procurement → assignment → maintenance → disposal
  • Link assets to users, locations, cost centers, and services
  • Manage peripherals, software installs, and license entitlements
  • Immutable audit trail for every state change
  • Bulk import/export via CSV or REST API
Assets — OpsDeck

Screenshot coming soon

Compliance

Compliance & Audit Management

Map your controls to industry frameworks and generate audit-ready evidence packages without the spreadsheet chaos.

  • Pre-built frameworks: SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and more
  • Control mapping with owner assignment and evidence collection
  • Statement of Applicability (SOA) generator
  • Immutable audit snapshots for any point in time
  • Gap analysis and remediation task tracking
Compliance — OpsDeck

Screenshot coming soon

Risk

Risk & Security Management

Maintain a living risk register that stays connected to your assets, vendors, and services — so nothing falls through the cracks.

  • Risk register with likelihood × impact scoring matrix
  • Link risks to assets, services, vendors, and controls
  • Security incident tracking with timeline and resolution
  • Security assessment scheduling and results
  • Risk heatmaps and trend reporting
Risk — OpsDeck

Screenshot coming soon

Vendors

Vendor & Procurement Management

Keep your entire vendor ecosystem organized — from contract lifecycle management to budget oversight and renewal tracking.

  • Supplier directory with compliance and contact info
  • Contract repository with renewal alerts and version control
  • Subscription tracking with cost allocation to cost centers
  • Budget management and spend reporting
  • Payment method and procurement workflow management
Vendors — OpsDeck

Screenshot coming soon

UAR

User Access Review

Run structured, defensible access reviews on schedule — with automated comparison, finding detection, and immutable records.

  • Define review cycles with configurable scope and reviewers
  • Automated comparison of expected vs. actual access
  • Findings surfaced automatically: orphaned, excessive, and ghost accounts
  • Reviewer workflow with approve / revoke / escalate actions
  • Immutable execution records for audit evidence
UAR — OpsDeck

Screenshot coming soon

No Hidden Gates

Everything in the open.

The OSS version has everything — SAML SSO, unlimited users, full API, RBAC. Nothing is gated except connectors, AI, and premium support.

Community
Free forever
Enterprise
Add-on plugin
Core Platform

Multi-factor authentication (TOTP)
Granular RBAC
Full audit log
REST API (OpenAPI / Swagger)

Unlimited users
Unlimited assets & records
Self-hosted (your infrastructure)
Enterprise Add-ons
API Connectors (GitHub, Google, AWS, Atlassian, M365, JumpCloud)
AI Agent & automation
Automated UAR sync from connectors

Support

Priority SLA
Response time
Best effort
< 4 hours
Dedicated Customer Success Manager

The Enterprise Plugin installs alongside your open-source instance. Uninstall anytime — your data stays yours.

Enterprise Plugin

Supercharge with the Enterprise Plugin

Optional paid add-on. Install alongside your self-hosted instance and unlock connectors, AI, and premium support.

  • GitHub, Google Workspace, AWS, Atlassian, Microsoft 365, JumpCloud connectors
  • Automated User Access Review sync
  • AI-powered assistant & automation
  • Connector task scheduling
  • Automated compliance reports
  • Priority support with SLA
  • Dedicated Customer Success Manager
  • Custom integration development

Add-on for your OSS instance

AI Agent

llama-index based assistant with SQL Guard and automated task execution

Priority Support

SLA-backed email support + dedicated Customer Success Manager

Custom pricing based on team size and requirements.
Contact us for a demo and quote.

Simple Pricing

Start free, scale when ready

The full platform is free forever. Pay only for the enterprise connectors, AI, and dedicated support you need.

Community

Free forever

Full platform, self-hosted, community support. Everything you need to run IT operations.

  • Full platform access
  • 40+ modules included
  • SAML SSO & MFA
  • Unlimited users & assets
  • REST API
  • Community support (GitHub Issues)
Get Started
Most Popular

Enterprise Plugin

Custom pricing

All connectors + AI on top of your self-hosted instance. Scales with your team.

  • Everything in Community
  • API Connectors (6 platforms)
  • AI Agent & automation
  • Automated UAR sync
  • Scheduled reports
  • Priority SLA support
  • Dedicated CSM
Contact Sales

Premium Support

Custom pricing

SLA-backed support for your OpsDeck instance. For teams that need reliable, fast responses.

  • Everything in Community
  • Priority email support
  • < 4 hour response SLA
  • Dedicated CSM
  • Onboarding assistance
  • Architecture review
Contact Sales

The Enterprise Plugin installs on top of your existing open-source instance. No migration needed.

Cancel anytime. Your data stays in your infrastructure — no lock-in, ever.

All pricing is custom — we work with your team size and compliance requirements to find the right fit.

OpsDeck

Open source IT governance for teams that care about security.
